stage.title: तपाईंको चरण छनौट गर्नुहोस्
stage.description: चाहे तपाईं कुलीन एथलीट होस् वा सप्ताहन्त योद्धा, हामीसँग तपाईंको अनुभवको स्तरको लागि ट्रेल छ।

adventures.title: अद्वितीय ट्रेल एडभेन्चर्स
adventures.description: दौडको घडीभन्दा पर इमर्सिभ हिमालयन अनुभव खोज्नेहरूका लागि क्युरेट गरिएका दौड प्याकेजहरू।

public_blogs.seo_title: Trailmandu Blog - Himalayan Stories & Trail Insights
public_blogs.seo_description: Explore deep insights into Nepal's trails, ultra-running tips, and stories from the heart of the Himalayas.
public_blogs.hero_desc: Gear reviews, race reports, and deep dives into the culture of Himalayan mountain running.
public_blogs.explore_featured: Explore this featured story from Trailmandu...
public_blogs.no_stories_desc: Try checking back later or exploring another category.
public_blogs.vision_desc: "Our mission is to bring the wild beauty of Nepal's trails to the world, foster a community of conscious runners, and protect the mountains we call home."
public_blogs.post_not_found_desc: The story you're looking for has moved to higher altitudes.
